title: cordia allartii
intro: Cordia allartii, also known as the "Wild Pear" or "Bodhi Tree", is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia allartii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Cordia allartii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
